title: pescatoria violacea
side_effects: Pescatoria violacea can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to respiratory problems, including asthma-like symptoms and shortness of breath. Some individuals may also experience stomach cramps, diarrhea, and vomiting due to the plant's potent compounds. Improper preparation and dosage of Pescatoria violacea can exacerbate these side effects, emphasizing the importance of proper supervision and caution when using the plant for medicinal purposes.
